title: Red Light, Green Light

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two switches
record:
"red light" on one switch 
"green light" on the other

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. The person playing with the switch user stands at the opposite end of the room.
2. When the switch user presses "green light", the person begins to walk or run toward them.
3. When the switch user presses "red light", they must stop immediately or lose a point.

tooltipText: Activate 2 switches to control the game, "red light" means stay still, "green light" means go!
